# Sai Nandu Vajhala

AI & Machine Learning Engineer specializing in deep learning models, low-latency audio assistants, and graph-based cognitive memory loops.

## Profile & Contact
- **Website:** https://sainandu.is-a.dev/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/SaiNanduVajhala
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/vajhala-sai-nandu
- **Kaggle:** https://kaggle.com/vajhalasainandu
- **Email:** vajhalasainandu@gmail.com

## Technical Specializations
- **Deep Learning:** PyTorch, TensorFlow, custom model design and training (convolutions, attention mechanisms, embeddings).
- **LLMs & Agentic Frameworks:** LangChain, LlamaIndex, vector DB databases, agent orchestration.
- **Cognitive Systems:** Graph-based memory OS databases, LangChain vector storage, cognee cloud structures.
- **Languages & Utilities:** Python, TypeScript, SQL, Git, Linux.

## Core Projects
### Oneiros
Cognitive Memory OS for AI Agents. Built a memory OS utilizing graph database structure loops, LangChain, and custom vector embeddings to power context-retaining autonomous agents.

### Low-Latency Audio Assistant
Real-time conversational AI voice assistant. Optimized audio stream loops, custom Voice Activity Detection (VAD), and API pathways to achieve sub-250ms low-latency conversation responses.

## Timeline & Milestones
- **Present:** Independent AI Research & System Engineering. Developing context-retaining agentic loops and optimizing audio models.
- **Competitions:** Active Kaggle Competitions contributor specializing in computer vision and natural language processing tasks.
